channel.title: Tags/Build-Planning on Create A Van Life
channel.description: Recent content in Tags/Build-Planning on Create A Van Life

item.title: Portable Power vs Full Electrical Build
item.description:
This decision should follow your use pattern, not online hype. Portable systems reduce install risk; fixed systems improve integration and scaling.

When Portable Power Wins
#

Portable power wins when your real life is moving faster than your build plan. When you are tired, behind, and still need tomorrow to work, a portable setup can keep your routine stable without adding install complexity.
